briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether buffered write to unshifted parts of OUT is present.
Maximum number of frames to be shifted from buffered input before new data is required.
Maximum number of frames to be shifted from buffered output before new data is required.
Maximum buffered number of frames to be shifted from buffered interrupt before new data is required.
No shifting.
OUTB used for buffering.
OUTB used for buffering, auto-toggle clock line.
Shift mode.
Continuous sampling (if CPU is not sleeping).
Sampling on Counter 1 event.
Sampling and shifting on Counter 1 event.
Input modes.
Trigger on counter 0 event.
Trigger on counter 1 event.
Trigger on specific VIO pin event.
Trigger on change in any VIO pin event.
Trigger on any VIO task event.
Trigger on shift count out event.
Trigger on shift count in event.
Unshifted pins trigger condition for transferring OUTUB to OUT.
Function for getting the pin directions mask.

simplesect.para: Mask of pin directions. 0 is input, 1 is output.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the pin directions mask.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pin directions to be set. 0 is input, 1 is output.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the specified pins as outputs.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current setting. They will not be set to input.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pins to be set as output.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the specified pins as inputs.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current setting. They will not be set to output.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pins to be set as input.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the buffered pin directions mask.

simplesect.para: Mask of pin directions. 0 is input, 1 is output.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the buffered pin directions mask.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pin directions to be set. 0 is input, 1 is output.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the specified buffered pins as outputs.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current setting. They will not be set to input.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pins to be set as output.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the specified buffered pins as inputs.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current setting. They will not be set to output.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pins to be set as input.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the dirty status of buffered pin directions mask.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer is dirty.
Buffer is clean.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the pin directions toggle mask.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pin directions to be toggled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the buffered pin directions toggle mask.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pin directions to be toggled.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the input values.

simplesect.para: Mask of input states. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the buffered input values.

simplesect.para: Mask of input states. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the buffered input values, reversed in each byte.

simplesect.para: Mask of input states. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the input mode.

simplesect.para: Input mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the input mode.

parameterdescription.para: Input mode to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the buffered input mode.

simplesect.para: Input mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the buffered input mode.

parameterdescription.para: Input mode to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the output values.

simplesect.para: Mask of output states. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the output values.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified output values.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set high.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified output values.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set low.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the buffered output values.

simplesect.para: Mask of output states. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the buffered output values.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified buffered output values.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set high.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified buffered output values.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set low.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the buffered output values, reversed in each byte.

simplesect.para: Mask of output states. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the buffered output values, reversed in each byte.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified buffered output values, reversed in each byte.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set high.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified buffered output values, reversed in each byte.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set low.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the buffered output values, reversed in each word.

simplesect.para: Mask of output states. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the buffered output values, reversed in the whole word.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified buffered output values, reversed in the whole word.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set high.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified buffered output values, reversed in the whole word.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set low.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the dirty status of buffered output values.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer is dirty.
Buffer is clean.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the output toggle mask.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output to be toggled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the buffered output toggle mask.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output to be toggled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the combined output and buffered output values.

simplesect.para: Lower 16 bits determine the output state, while higher 16 bits determine the buffered output state.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set. 0 is low, 1 is high.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified combined output and buffered output values.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set high.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified combined output and buffered output values.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output states to be set low.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the combined output and buffered output toggle mask.

simplesect.para: Lower 16 bits determine the output toggle, while higher 16 bits determine the buffered output toggle.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of output to be toggled.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the dirty status of combined output and buffered output values.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer is dirty.
Buffer is clean.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the configuration of output mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure to be filled with output mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the configuration of output mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure with output mode to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the buffered configuration of output mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure to be filled with buffered output mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the buffered configuration of output mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure with buffered output mode to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the buffered shift control register configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure with buffered shift control configuration to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the buffered shift control register configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure to be filled with buffered shift control configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the VIO configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure to be filled with VIO configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the VIO configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure with VIO configuration to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the VIO configuration's input pin to sample on separate pin.
Function for setting the VIO configuration's input pin to sample on same OUT pin.
Function for getting the combined pin directions mask and output values.

simplesect.para: Lower 16 bits determine the output state, while higher 16 bits determine the pin directions.
Mask of pin directions and output values.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the combined pin directions mask and output values.

simplesect.para: Lower 16 bits determine the output state, while higher 16 bits determine the pin directions.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pin directions and output values.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the combined pin directions mask and output values.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.
Lower 16 bits determine the output state, while higher 16 bits determine the pin directions.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pins to be set as output and output states to be set high.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the combined pin directions mask and output values.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.
Lower 16 bits determine the output state, while higher 16 bits determine the pin directions.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pins to be set as input and output states to be set low.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the combined buffered pin directions mask and buffered output values.

simplesect.para: Lower 16 bits determine the buffered output state, while higher 16 bits determine the buffered pin directions.
Mask of buffered pin directions and buffered output values.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the combined buffered pin directions mask and buffered output values.

simplesect.para: Lower 16 bits determine the buffered output state, while higher 16 bits determine the buffered pin directions.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of buffered pin directions and buffered output values.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the combined buffered pin directions mask and buffered output values.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.
Lower 16 bits determine the buffered output state, while higher 16 bits determine the buffered pin directions.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of buffered pins to be set as output and buffered output states to be set high.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the combined buffered pin directions mask and buffered output values.

simplesect.para: Pins not set to 1 will retain their current value. They will not be modified.
Lower 16 bits determine the buffered output state, while higher 16 bits determine the buffered pin directions.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of pins to be set as input and output states to be set low.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the dirty status of combined buffered pin directions mask and buffered output values.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer is dirty.
Buffer is clean.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the combined pin directions and output toggle masks.

simplesect.para: Lower 16 bits determine the output toggle, while higher 16 bits determine the pin directions toggle.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of values to be toggled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the combined buffered pin directions and buffered output toggle masks.

simplesect.para: Lower 16 bits determine the buffered output toggle, while higher 16 bits determine the buffered pin directions toggle.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of values to be toggled.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the number of frames to be shifted from buffered input before new data is required.

simplesect.para: Number of frames to be shifted from buffered input before new data is required.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the number of frames to be shifted from buffered input before new data is required.

parameterdescription.para: Number for frames to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the number of frames to be shifted from buffered output before new data is required.

simplesect.para: Number of frames to be shifted from buffered output before new data is required.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the number of frames to be shifted from buffered output before new data is required.

parameterdescription.para: Number for frames to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the buffered number of frames to be shifted from buffered output before new data is required.

simplesect.para: Buffered number of frames to be shifted from buffered output before new data is required.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the buffered number of frames to be shifted from buffered output before new data is required.

parameterdescription.para: Number for frames to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the buffered unshifted parts of OUT register.

parameterdescription.para: Buffered unshifted parts of OUT register.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the buffered unshifted parts of OUT register.

simplesect.para: Buffered unshifted parts of OUT register.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the trigger for buffered unshifted parts of OUT register.

parameterdescription.para: Trigger for buffered unshifted parts of OUT register.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the trigger for buffered unshifted parts of OUT register.

simplesect.para: Trigger for buffered unshifted parts of OUT register.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the toggle mask for buffered unshifted parts of OUT register.

parameterdescription.para: Mask of buffered unshifted parts of OUT register to be toggled.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking the dirty status of buffered unshifted parts of OUT register.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer is dirty.
Buffer is clean.
